examples: they played as long as it was light
as long as the lighting was good

meanings.definition: apparatus for supplying artificial light effects for the stage or a film
the craft of providing artificial light
examples: an interior decorator must understand lighting

meanings.definition: the act of setting something on fire

examples: This lamp lightens the room a bit
After the meal, some of the diners lit up

meanings.definition: cause to start burning; subject to fire or great heat
examples: Great heat can ignite almost any dry matter

meanings.definition: fall to somebody by assignment or lot
examples: It fell to me to notify the parents of the victims
